_comment: Framework-repo overrides for project-config.defaults.json. The apexyard framework repo itself dog-foods its own pre-push gate here — see .claude/hooks/pre-push-gate.sh and docs/getting-started.md § 'Terminal push hook'. Managed projects under governance set their own pre_push.commands per their stack.

ticket._comment: The shipped /migration skill emits '[Migration] <type>: <summary>' titles, but the defaults prefix_whitelist omits 'Migration', so validate-issue-structure.sh blocks every migration ticket. Add it here (arrays are replaced on merge — full list reproduced) and define its required sections (deep-merged into defaults' required_sections). Candidate to upstream into project-config.defaults.json.

git._comment: This fork is used as a private ops/portfolio repo — 'main' is its daily-work trunk, NOT the framework's release-cut main. Drop 'main' from the protected list so block-main-push.sh / validate-branch-name.sh allow direct portfolio-doc commits here, while keeping master/dev/develop protected. Array REPLACES the default list.

pre_push._comment: Commands mirror the locally-runnable CI jobs from .github/workflows/. Each entry guards for a missing tool: a missing tool prints an actionable install message and exits 0 (skip-with-note) so a contributor without the tool is not hard-blocked. Link-check (lychee) is intentionally excluded — it is slow and network-flaky, unsuitable for pre-push. See docs/getting-started.md for the git pre-push hook (core.hooksPath) wiring.

commands.name: markdownlint
commands.run: command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'INFO: npx not found — markdownlint check skipped. Install Node.js (https://nodejs.org) to enable it locally.'; exit 0; }; md_files=$(git ls-files '*.md' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$md_files" ] && { echo 'INFO: no tracked markdown files found — markdownlint check skipped.'; exit 0; }; echo "$md_files" | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 npx --yes markdownlint-cli2 2>&1

commands.name: shellcheck
commands.run: command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'INFO: shellcheck not installed — shell-script check skipped. Install with: brew install shellcheck  (macOS) | apt-get install shellcheck  (Debian/Ubuntu) | dnf install shellcheck  (Fedora).'; exit 0; }; find .claude/hooks -maxdepth 1 -name '*.sh' | sort | xargs shellcheck --severity=warning 2>&1
